title: Show HN: When Seeing Isn't Enough: Rescuing Stuck LLM Agents
summary: Hi HN, we are sharing our latest preprint from CAUM Systems. We found that LLM coding agents enter 'blind-spot failures' that are completely unrescuable by behavioral nudging, but 100% rescuable by adding a single sentence of causal interpretation about structural data. We introduce the 'bandwidth of observer' framework and explain why cross-model evaluation is critical to tell blind-spots apart from capability floors. Happy to answer questions!
